title: Administrative Management
summary: MCAAT Finance checklist - Administrative Management. 14 unique items across 3 audiences.

source.title: MCAAT Finance Checklist - Administrative Management
source.publisher: Marine Corps Manpower and Reserve Affairs

items.question: Were all deputies, agents, cashiers, custodians, and certifying officers properly appointed and given written operating instructions regarding their duties and responsibilities in accordance with the references? NOTE: This includes adherence to Certifying Officer Legislation and all applicable waivers.
references: DoDFMR Vol. 5 Ch. 2 & 5, FPM Vol 4 Ch.2, and MCO 4650.39A Ch. 2

items.question: Were all deputies, agents, cashiers, custodians, and certifying officers properly appointed and given written operating instructions regarding their duties and responsibilities in accordance with the references? NOTE: This includes adherence to Certifying Officer Legislation and all applicable waivers.
references: DODFMR Vol. 5 Ch. 2 & 5 and FPM Vol 3 Ch.2 & MCO 4650.39A Ch. 2

items.question: Are revocations issued to deputies, agents, cashiers, custodians, or certifying officers when their job assignment has been terminated in accordance with the references?
references: DODFMR Vol. 5 Ch. 2 & 5 and FPM Vol 3 Ch.2 & MCO 4650.39A Ch. 2

items.question: Are TFS Forms 3023 (specimen signature card) submitted in accordance with the references?
references: DODFMR Vol. 5 Ch. 2 & FPM Vol 3 Ch. 2

items.question: Is the DO's request to hold cash at personal risk submitted semi-annually or as needed to the approving authority? NOTE: The total cash accountability of all appointed agents combined must not exceed the cash accountability of DO.
references: DODFMR Vol. 5 Ch. 3

items.question: Are the facility, safeguarding of public funds, security equipment (i.e. alarm system), and security procedures inspected in accordance with the reference?
references: DODFMR Vol. 5 Ch. 3 par 030302.B and MCO 5530.14A Ch. 3

items.question: Are MCTFS ELSIGs properly maintained to include the MELSIG and are the ELSIG reports posted to the RFF-KCI SharePoint in accordance with the references?
references: FPM Vol 1 Ch. 1

items.question: Are online unit diaries processed and maintained in accordance with the reference?
references: FPM Vol 1 Ch. 1

items.question: Does the office maintain the required accesses and / or separation of duties for the Document Tracking and Management System (DTMS)?
references: DoDFMR Vol 5 Ch.1, FPM Vol 1 Ch. 2 & 16

items.question: Does the office maintain the required accesses and / or separation of duties for the Defense Travel System (DTS)?
references: DoDFMR Vol 5 Ch. 1, MCO 4650.39A Ch. 2, FPM Vol 2 Ch. 8

items.question: Does the office maintain the required accesses and / or separation of duties for the Integrated Automated Travel System (IATS)?
references: DoDFMR Vol 5 Ch. 1, FPM Vol 2 Ch. 8 & Appendix G, FPM Vol 1 Ch. 16

items.question: Does the office maintain the required accesses and / or separation of duties for the Deployable Disbursing System (DDS)?
references: DoDFMR Vol 5 Ch. 1, FPM Vol 1 Ch. 16, FPM Vol 3 Ch. 18, DDS User Manual

items.question: Does the office maintain the required accesses and/or separation of duties for the CAPS-W System?
references: FPM Vol 1 Ch. 16, FPM Vol 3 Ch. 12, RFF Policy Letter 1-16

items.question: Does the office maintain separation of duties for ITS.gov and OTC.net?
references: DoDFMR Vol 5 Ch. 5 & 11, FPM Vol 1 Ch. 16, FPM Vol 3 Ch. 18

items.question: Were all deputies, agents, cashiers, custodians, and certifying officers properly appointed and given written operating instructions regarding their duties and responsibilities in accordance with the references? NOTE: This includes adherence to Certifying Officer Legislation and all applicable waivers.
references: DoDFMR Vol. 5 Ch. 2 & 5, FPM Vol 4 Ch.2, and MCO 4650.39A Ch. 2
